alternate_form.name: Alternate Form
alternate_form.description: Assume an alternate physical form with different traits. Choose effects to represent the form, apply Activation flaw (-1 for move, -2 for standard).

blast.name: Blast
blast.description: A ranged damage attack — energy blast, projectile, or similar effect. Attack check vs. Dodge, target resists with Toughness.

dazzle.name: Dazzle
dazzle.description: Overwhelm a sense with a flash, sonic burst, etc. Cumulative affliction targeting one sense type.

duplication.name: Duplication
duplication.description: Create a duplicate of yourself. Duplicate is a minion with your traits (rank x 15 character points). Full copy requires rank = (total CP - Duplication cost) / 15.

element_control.name: Element Control
element_control.description: Telekinetically control a specific element (earth, water, fire, air). Effective Strength equals rank. Typically has Alternate Effects for related tricks.

energy_absorption.name: Energy Absorption
energy_absorption.description: Absorb a specific energy type to enhance a trait. Boost equals the lesser of your rank or the attack's rank. Fades 1 rank per round. Does not provide damage resistance on its own.

energy_aura.name: Energy Aura
energy_aura.description: Anyone touching you or that you touch must resist your Damage rank. Toggle on/off as a free action.

energy_control.name: Energy Control
energy_control.description: Generate and project energy (cold, electricity, fire, force, magnetism, radiation, cosmic). Like Blast but typically with Alternate Effects for environmental manipulation, crowd control, etc.

force_field.name: Force Field
force_field.description: Protective energy field granting Toughness bonus equal to rank. Noticeable by default. Often combined with Impervious.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.description: Total visual concealment. 4 points for normal vision only, 8 points for all visual senses. Other senses can still detect you.

magic.name: Magic
magic.description: Spellcasting — default is an eldritch blast (Ranged Damage). Expand with Alternate Effects for other spells (bindings, dispelling, divination, teleportation). All effects carry the 'magic' descriptor. Common complication: Power Loss if unable to speak/gesture.

mental_blast.name: Mental Blast
mental_blast.description: Psychic attack striking the mind. No attack roll needed (Perception range). Resisted by Will instead of Toughness. No effect on targets immune to Will effects (inanimate objects, mindless). Often Subtle.

mimic.name: Mimic
mimic.description: Duplicate traits of a perceived character. Gain (rank x 5) character points of traits, limited to target's capabilities. Move action to scan and copy.

mind_control.name: Mind Control
mind_control.description: Impose your will on a target. Cumulative Perception-range Affliction resisted by Will. Degrees of failure escalate from dazed to fully controlled.

power_lifting.name: Power-Lifting
power_lifting.description: Enhanced Strength that only applies to lifting/carrying capacity. Does not increase Strength-based damage or other Strength checks.

shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
shapeshift.description: Transform into different physical forms. Gain (rank x 5) character points of physical traits. Cannot gain mental traits from assumed forms. Often Limited to a category (animals, machines, etc.).

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.description: Cause tremendous weariness leading to sleep. Ranged Affliction resisted by Fortitude. Often enhanced with Cumulative or Progressive modifiers.

snare.name: Snare
snare.description: Entangle target with webs, ice, glue, energy bonds, etc. Resisted by Dodge. Can break free with Damage check (Strength-based) or Sleight of Hand.

strike.name: Strike
strike.description: Enhanced close-range damage — claws, energy fists, supernatural striking force. Can replace or supplement Strength-based damage.

suffocation.name: Suffocation
suffocation.description: Prevent target from breathing. Progressive Ranged Affliction resisted by Fortitude. Conditions worsen with each failed save.

super_speed.name: Super-Speed
super_speed.description: Enhanced Initiative (+4/rank to initiative), Quickness (halve routine task time per rank), and Speed (ground movement per rank). Often paired with Area/Multiattack Damage for rapid attacks.
